html:
GenericBurningReviving

Carcasses are the dead bodies of creatures. Besides the Koalefant Carcass, all of them appear after killing a certain mob under certain conditions. They can be burned to avoid their respective spawn.

Contents

  • 1 Common Mutation condition
  • 2 Crystal-Crested Buzzard condition
  • 3 Incursive Gestalt condition
  • 4 Stay Carcasses conditions
  • 5 Mobs that can't have Carcasses
  • 6 Koalefant Carcass
  • 7 Tips
  • 8 Trivia
  • 9 Gallery

Common Mutation condition

Some carcasses can be mutated and turn to the other mob.After death, their body has a 50% chance to leave their remains behind. After a couple of seconds, it will start shaking and burst out into their Mutated form; if certain additional conditions were followed: was killed on a specific land like:

  • In Lunar Island
  • In Lunar Grotto
  • In Lunar Rift Floor
  • In Moonstorm
  • Under Lunar Hail
  • Under Enlightenment Full Moon.

Hounds killed by a Possessed Varg's frost breath will be guaranteed to leave behind corpses, and soon mutate into Horror Hounds.

Wurt with the Lunar Mutated Merm skill can feed loyal Merms or Merm Guards a Moon Shard/Infused Moon Shard to convert them into their mutated form. With the Terra Mutation skill, Wurt can cast a spell using the Brilliant Mudslinger to do the same.

Crystal-Crested Buzzard condition

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
When Crystal-Crested Buzzards are nearby (indicated by their shadows), the corpse of the mob will stay until it is eaten by them. Some will be mutated by the birds. Mob loot will not drop unless all the mutated Buzzards are gone, unless it was eaten by them, then the amount of items will be reduced and some will be spoiled immediately.

If there is no Crystal-Crested Buzzard around, then the carcass will drop all items that should be dropped from original mob. If it was eaten by Crystal-Crested Buzzards then the drop will change:

  • All drops that can be rotted will not drop expect of one
  • One of rottable items will be dropped very rotted.
  • All items that have durability will drop with 10%

That works with all mobs.

Incursive Gestalt condition

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

“Day 56 - Lunar Mutations Study

It seems as though these strange entities that emerged from the rifts are in search of living hosts... or perhaps once living.”

–Grainy Transmission

When a Lunar Rift is active in the world, killing some mobs will leave their respective Carcass on the ground. After some time, an Incursive Gestalt will appear and float to the Carcass. Afterwards, it enters the Carcass and reanimates the fallen Mob.

Mobs that can't have Carcasses

All Clockworks mobs, plant mobs, stone, clay and cookie made mobs can't leave carcasses. Rock Lobsters, Grass Gekkos and Grass Gators can leave corpses though.

  • Clockwork Bishop
  • Damaged Bishop
  • Clockwork Knight
  • Damaged Knight
  • Clockwork Rook

Koalefant Carcass

Tracking a Suspicious Dirt Pile with a Hound's Tooth on it will eventually lead to a Koalefant Carcass surrounded by a Varg and some Hounds which will progressively eat from the Carcass. The Carcass will disappear once the Varg and Hounds have been defeated or after the Varg bites its bones once it's done eating.

The Koalefant Carcass will have 2 Meat and 1 Koalefant Trunk dropped around it. The Varg and its Hounds will not eat them as long as the Carcass still has meat on it.

The Koalefant Carcass has four stages as it is being eaten: it is fully intact in the first stage; in its second and third stage, its top half will disappear, revealing the Koalefant's spine and ribcage, and in the fourth stage all meat will be gone from it, leaving only some bones behind.

Tips

  • To avoid any corpses getting mutated, the player can burn the corpses using a Torch, Lighter or Fire Staff.
    • Be quick when dealing with Hound Carcasses, as setting them on fire while their emerging animation is already playing will still spawn a Horror Hound after attempting to burn it.

Trivia

  • The Hound Carcass was added in Return of Them.
  • The Koalefant and Boss Carcasses were added in From Beyond.

Gallery

  • Possessed Varg effect Test animation from Rhymes with Play

Don't Starve
Together
GenericBurningReviving
“It's definitely dead.”
–Wilson
“Gross!”
–Willow
“Is dead. Too bad.”
–Wolfgang
“The shadow of death lies upon it.”
–Wendy
“A DEAD FLESHLING. POINT AND LAUGH”
–WX-78
“It appears to be deceased.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's dead alright.”
–Woodie
“Apologies, Higgsbury. I thought that stench was coming from you.”
–Maxwell
“Its söul hath departed tö the realm öf the dead.”
–Wigfrid
“Are we sure it's not just sleeping?”
–Webber
“It has passed on.”
–Warly
“Won't wake up”
–Wormwood
“Dead-er than a doornail.”
–Winona
“I'm not mistaken, its life's been taken.”
–Wortox
“It dead. But will poke to make sure.”
–Wurt
“That's just how things go in the wilderness, sometimes.”
–Walter
“I'd better burn that thing before it's too late.”
–Wanda
“No coming back from that.”
–Wilson
“Ahhh, that's better.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang feel safer now.”
–Wolfgang
“May you find peace.”
–Wendy
“REBOOT DISABLED”
–WX-78
“A necessary precaution.”
–Wickerbottom
“Better to do it now than regret it later, eh?”
–Woodie
“The pragmatic approach.”
–Maxwell
“Blaze brightly, för all tö see.”
–Wigfrid
“We really hope it wasn't just sleeping.”
–Webber
“Flame-seared.”
–Warly
“Bye bye”
–Wormwood
“Better safe than sorry.”
–Winona
“Cleansing fire, so the worst won't transpire.”
–Wortox
“Bye-bye dead thing!”
–Wurt
“We gotta make sure it doesn't rise from the dead!”
–Walter
“One less potential reanimated corpse to worry about.”
–Wanda
“Many unhappy returns.”
–Wilson
“Yup, preventable.”
–Willow
“No! Is wrong!”
–Wolfgang
“Awakened from its eternal slumber.”
–Wendy
“UNIT REBOOTING”
–WX-78
“It is reviving, unfortunately.”
–Wickerbottom
“Oh geez.”
–Woodie
“It can't even die properly.”
–Maxwell
“Back för möre, are we?”
–Wigfrid
“We thought it was dead.”
–Webber
“It is unnatural.”
–Warly
“Back?”
–Wormwood
“Why can't it stay dead?”
–Winona
“It's turning and returning.”
–Wortox
“Oh florp.”
–Wurt
“Woby! It's back from the dead!”
–Walter
“I was afraid of this.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Xác chết là xác chết của sinh vật. Ngoài Xác Koalefant, tất cả chúng đều xuất hiện sau khi giết một mob nhất định trong những điều kiện nhất định. Chúng có thể bị đốt cháy để tránh sự sinh sản tương ứng của chúng.

[[Possessed Varg]] |- |} ==Mobs that can't have Carcasses== All Clockworks mobs, plant mobs, stone, clay and cookie made mobs can't leave carcasses. {{DSTL|Rock Lobster}}s, [[Grass Gekko|Grass Gekkos]] and [[Grass Gator|Grass Gators]] can leave corpses though.

== Koalefant Carcass == {{Object Infobox |canBeBurned = 1 |image = Koalefant's Carcass.png|Stage 1 Koalefant's Carcass 2.png|Stage 2 Koalefant's Carcass 3.png|Stage 3 Koalefant's Carcass 4.png|Stage 4 |name = Koalefant |spawnFrom = {{Pic32|Suspicious Dirt Pile}} |spawnCode = "koalefantcorpse" }} Tracking a [[Suspicious Dirt Pile]] with a [[Hound's Tooth]] on it will eventually lead to a '''Koalefant Carcass''' surrounded by a [[Varg]] and some [[Hound]]s which will progressively eat from the Carcass. The Carcass will disappear once the Varg and Hounds have been defeated or after the Varg bites its bones once it's done eating. The Koalefant Carcass will have 2 [[Meat]] and 1 [[Koalefant Trunk]] dropped around it. The Varg and its Hounds will not eat them as long as the Carcass still has meat on it. The Koalefant Carcass has four stages as it is being eaten: it is fully intact in the first stage; in its second and third stage, its top half will disappear, revealing the Koalefant's spine and ribcage, and in the fourth stage all meat will be gone from it, leaving only some bones behind. {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * To avoid any corpses getting mutated, the player can burn the corpses using a Torch, Lighter or Fire Staff. ** Be quick when dealing with Hound Carcasses, as setting them on fire while their emerging animation is already playing will still spawn a Horror Hound after attempting to burn it. == {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Hound Carcass was added in ''[[Return of Them]].'' * The Koalefant and Boss Carcasses were added in [[From Beyond|''From Beyond'']]. {{clear}} =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== RWP_FB3_2_Possessed_Varg_Test_animation3.gif|Possessed Varg effect Test animation from Rhymes with Play {{Structures}} [[vi:Carcass/DST]]
